title: cladomyza ledermannii
intro: Cladomyza ledermannii, also known as the New Caledonian velvet bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cladomyza ledermannii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in New Caledonia.
